setup.title: Initial Configuration
setup.stepDesc: This account will be used to access the management portal. The database connection is already configured in the server .env file.

privacy.exportError: Could not export your data. Please try again.
privacy.deleteConfirm: This permanently deletes the Discord account data stored by this panel (profile, login tokens and the link to your ARK character) and logs you out. Your in-game progress is NOT affected. Continue?
privacy.deleteError: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

page.title: Privacy Policy
page.intro: This panel ("ArkManiaGest") is the management and player portal for an ARK: Survival Ascended game cluster. This notice explains, as required by Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), which personal data the panel processes, why, for how long, and which rights you can exercise.

controller.title: 1. Data controller
controller.body: The data controller is the operator of the game cluster this panel belongs to. You can reach the operator through the community's Discord server or the contact channel published on the community website.

data.title: 2. What data we process
data.body:
Panel accounts (admins/operators): username, display name, a bcrypt hash of the password (never the password itself), role and last-login time.

Discord sign-in: your Discord user ID, username, display name and avatar hash, plus the OAuth access/refresh tokens Discord issues — stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM) and used only to read your basic profile ("identify" scope; we never request your e-mail).

Game link: the EOS player ID of your ARK character and the in-game data already recorded by the game servers (character name, tribe, permission groups, shop points, leaderboard scores, session login times).

Technical data: the source IP address of requests, used in-memory for rate limiting and recorded in the security audit log for login attempts and administrative actions. Game servers also record the IP you connect from while you are online.

purposes.title: 3. Purposes and legal bases
purposes.body:
Operating the panel and the player dashboard you request (performance of the service — Art. 6(1)(b)).

Security: rate limiting, brute-force protection, and an audit trail of logins and administrative actions (legitimate interest in protecting the service — Art. 6(1)(f), and compliance with security obligations such as the NIS2 directive).

Discord sign-in happens only when you choose it and approve Discord's consent screen (Art. 6(1)(a)). No data is used for advertising, profiling or analytics, and nothing is shared with third parties other than Discord itself during the sign-in flow.

retention.title: 4. Retention
retention.body:
Discord session: 24 hours (cookie lifetime).

Discord profile and OAuth tokens: until you delete your account from the dashboard (or an admin unlinks it).

Security audit log and server action history: deleted automatically after 365 days (configurable by the operator).

Rate-limiting IP tracking: held in memory only, for minutes.

Game data (characters, tribes, scores) follows the game servers' own lifecycle (e.g. wipes) and is not retained by the panel itself.

rights.title: 5. Your rights
rights.body:
You can access and export the data the panel stores about you at any time from your player dashboard ("Export my data" — Art. 15/20) and erase your Discord account data with "Delete my account" (Art. 17).

For rectification, restriction, objection, or anything the self-service tools don't cover, contact the operator (Section 1). You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your supervisory authority (in Italy, the Garante per la protezione dei dati personali).

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and local storage
cookies.body:
The panel uses only strictly necessary cookies: "disc_oauth_state" (10 minutes, protects the Discord sign-in against CSRF) and "disc_session" (24 hours, keeps you signed in). Both are HttpOnly, Secure and SameSite=Lax.

The browser additionally stores your interface preferences (theme, language) in localStorage and the admin session token in sessionStorage (cleared when the tab closes). No tracking, advertising or analytics cookies are used, so no cookie consent banner is required under the ePrivacy rules.

eventLog.title: Event Log
eventLog.purgeConfirmAll:
WARNING: delete ALL events ({{type}})?
This action cannot be undone!
eventLog.purgeConfirmOlder:
Delete events older than {{days}} days ({{type}})?
This action cannot be undone.
eventLog.purgeFootnote: All events older than the selected retention date will be removed. Action cannot be undone.

bans.heading: Ban Manager
bans.subtitle: Cluster-wide ban management — {{count}} active bans
bans.searchPlaceholder: Search by EOS ID, name or reason…
bans.emptyNoneAll: The cluster has no recorded bans
bans.emptyNoneActive: No active bans on the cluster

decay.heading: Decay Manager
decay.subtitle: Tribe decay management — {{count}} tribes monitored
decay.scheduleTitle: Queue this tribe in ARKM_decay_pending; the next plugin purge sweep destroys it.
decay.confirmSchedule:
Schedule tribe #{{id}} ({{name}}) for destruction on every server?

The panel only stages the request; the plugin's next periodic sweep destroys all of the tribe's structures and dinos. Use 'Cancel' from the Pending tab to revert before the sweep runs.
decay.purgeNowTitle: Schedule this tribe AND immediately fire ARKM.DM.Purge over RCON on every active instance.
decay.confirmPurgeNow:
Purge tribe #{{id}} ({{name}}) RIGHT NOW?

The panel will: 1) insert the tribe into ARKM_decay_pending on every server, then 2) send ARKM.DM.Purge over RCON to every active ARK instance.
The plugin destroys all of the tribe's structures and dinos and writes the audit log entries.

This cannot be undone.
decay.purgeNowDone: Tribe #{{id}} purged: queued on {{rows}} server(s), RCON ok on {{ok}}/{{total}} instances.
decay.runPurgeTitle: Send ARKM.DM.Purge over RCON to every active ARK instance now.
decay.confirmRunPurge:
Run ARKM.DM.Purge on every active ARK instance NOW?

This triggers the plugin's purge sweep on each contacted server: every tribe currently listed in ARKM_decay_pending gets its structures + dinos destroyed.

This cannot be undone.
decay.cancelTitle: Remove this tribe from the pending purge queue (the decay timer keeps ticking)
decay.confirmCancel:
Cancel pending purge for tribe #{{id}} ({{name}}) on {{server}}?

The row in ARKM_decay_pending is removed; the tribe stays in ARKM_tribe_decay and the regular decay timer continues.
decay.cancelDone: Pending entry for tribe #{{id}} removed ({{rows}} row(s)).
decay.cancelFailed: Could not cancel the pending purge.

leaderboard.heading: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: ArkMania player ranking
leaderboard.clearPveTitle: Wipe ALL PvE leaderboard scores + events. PvP rows are NOT touched.
leaderboard.clearPvpTitle: Wipe ALL PvP leaderboard scores + events. PvE rows are NOT touched.
leaderboard.clearConfirm:
Wipe the {{type}} leaderboard?

This deletes every {{type}} score row AND every {{type}} event from the log.
The other server type ({{type}} = PvP -> PvE, and vice versa) is NOT touched.
This action cannot be undone.

rareDinos.heading: Rare Dinos
rareDinos.subtitle: {{total}} dinos in pool — {{enabled}} enabled, {{disabled}} disabled
rareDinos.clearSpawnsTitle: Wipe the rare-dino event log (ARKM_rare_spawns). The pool itself is NOT touched.
rareDinos.clearSpawnsConfirm:
Truncate the rare-dino spawn / kill EVENT log?

The configured pool of rare dinos is NOT affected — only the recorded events (spawns, kills, despawns) are deleted. This action cannot be undone.
rareDinos.clearSpawnsFailed: Could not clear the spawn table.

syncPanel.title: Sync Names from .arkprofile
syncPanel.empty: No container with SavedArks found. Run a scan from the Containers page first.

bulkAlign.headerTitleEnabled: Open the align-timed-perms modal for the {{count}} selected player(s)
bulkAlign.headerTitleDisabled: Tick at least one row in the table to enable align
bulkAlign.modalHint: Pick a family of related groups (e.g. VIP, Dead, Decadimento). For each player, every ACTIVE entry in the family gets bumped to the latest active expiry in that family.
bulkAlign.semanticsHint:
Per-player rules:
  • Find the latest expiry among active family entries.
  • Bump every other active family entry to that date.
  • Expired entries are NEVER touched.
  • Players with 0 or 1 active family members are skipped.
bulkAlign.confirm:
Align timed-perm expiries for {{count}} player(s) within the family [{{groups}}]?

For each player we set every active family entry to the latest active timestamp present.  Expired entries are NOT touched.
bulkAlign.done: Alignment done: {{aligned}} player(s) updated ({{entries}} entries), {{skipped}} skipped, {{missing}} not found.
bulkAlign.errorTooFewGroups: Pick at least 2 group names to align together.

bulkPerm.headerTitleEnabled: Open the bulk timed-permission modal for the {{count}} selected player(s)
bulkPerm.headerTitleDisabled: Tick at least one row in the table to enable bulk grant
bulkPerm.modalHint: Pick a group and a duration; we'll EXTEND existing entries by that delta and ADD new ones for players that don't yet have the group.
bulkPerm.semanticsHint: Existing permission → expiry := max(current, now) + chosen duration. Missing permission → entry created with now + chosen duration.
bulkPerm.confirm:
Grant timed permission '{{group}}' to {{count}} player(s) for an extra {{duration}}?

Players who already have this group get their expiry extended by the chosen amount; players without the group get a fresh entry of the same duration. Other timed permissions are NOT touched.
bulkPerm.done: Bulk grant applied: {{updated}} player(s) updated ({{extended}} extended, {{added}} added), {{missing}} not found.
bulkPerm.errorBadDuration: Pick a valid duration (at least 1 minute).

maps.notFound: Player not found in any map

ambiguous.title: Multiple characters found for {{n}} players
ambiguous.intro: For each of these players more than one distinct name was found on the cluster (a different character per server, or a rename that did not propagate). Pick the correct name for each one and press Apply.
ambiguous.skipThis: Don't update now (keep the current name in the DB)

importMissing.banner: Found {{n}} .arkprofile profiles with no row in Players. Import them?

importMissing.intro: Rows will be inserted into `Players` with `PermissionGroups=Default,`.  Entries already present are skipped automatically.

wipe.done: Deleted {{n}} character files on the cluster.
wipe.title: Delete character cluster-wide
wipe.intro: All `.arkprofile` files for this EOS will be deleted from the SavedArks of every container.  On next login the player will spawn as a fresh character.  The `Players` row (permissions) is NOT touched.
wipe.noFiles: No .arkprofile files found for this EOS.  The character is already clean.

database.title: Database Configuration
database.subtitle: MariaDB connections — configured in the server .env file
database.panelHint: ArkManiaGest data: panel users, SSH machines, settings, server and MariaDB instances, action log.
database.pluginHintConfigured: Game-plugin data (ARKM_config / bans / rare_dinos / players / leaderboard / decay) and the native ARK tables.
database.pluginHintFallback: PLUGIN_DB_* not configured in .env: the plugin shares the Panel DB connection (legacy mode).

configCard.title: Configuration
configCard.body: Credentials live in the backend's .env file. To change them, edit .env (use DB_* for the panel and PLUGIN_DB_* for the plugin) and restart the backend. SSH machine passwords are stored AES-256-GCM encrypted in the Panel DB.

instances.title: ARK Server Instances
instances.subtitle: Manage ARK: Survival Ascended containers via POK-manager on your SSH machines.
instances.noInstances: No instances configured yet. Use "Scan machines" to discover existing containers, or click "New instance" to create one from scratch.
instances.orphansHint: Containers found by SSH that are NOT yet registered as managed instances. Click Import to promote one into the panel DB.
instances.importHint: Discovered on {{machine}}. Set the admin password (required) and any overrides; the rest is inferred from the scan.

form.name: Instance name
form.nameHint: Used for container name and filesystem dir. Letters, digits, _ and - only.
form.adminPasswordEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current password.

instances.confirmDelete: Delete instance '{{name}}'? This removes the panel record. The container files on the host are NOT deleted.
instances.confirmDeleteWithPurge: Also stop the container on the host before deleting?
instances.confirmUpdate:
Update ARK binaries on '{{name}}'?

The server will be stopped while Steam downloads the new build. This can take 5–15 minutes on a fast host, longer on slow disks or slow connections. The page will appear frozen until the update finishes — do not close it.

log.title: Recent actions for {{name}}
log.empty: No actions recorded for this instance yet.

discord.title: Discord
discord.subtitle: Manage Discord accounts, ARK player links and bot interactions.

settings.restartHint: Pydantic loads .env at boot -- restart the service to activate the changes:

hint.redirectUri: Must match EXACTLY the URI registered on the Discord Developer Portal -> OAuth2 -> Redirects.
hint.guildId: Right-click the server name on Discord (with Developer Mode enabled) -> Copy Server ID.
hint.vipRoleId: Discord snowflake of the role mirrored from the ARK plugin DB.  Right-click the role -> Copy Role ID (Developer Mode required).

secret.placeholder: Leave empty to keep current value

errors.guildProbe: Bot credentials are set but Discord rejected the guild lookup.

hint.redirectMissing: Set DISCORD_REDIRECT_URI in .env and restart the service.
hint.redirectRegister: This URI must be registered EXACTLY in Discord Developer Portal -> OAuth2 -> Redirects.
hint.vipRoleMissing: Set DISCORD_VIP_ROLE_ID in .env and restart the service.

config.whitelistsExplain: Discord IDs listed here are auto-promoted to the matching role at first Sign-in with Discord (a 'discord:<id>' AppUser is created automatically).  The explicit Accounts -> Link AppUser flow always wins over a whitelist.
config.whitelistsEditHint: To change a whitelist: edit /opt/arkmaniagest/backend/.env and run 'systemctl restart arkmaniagest'.

vipSync.explain: Manual reconciliation.  Reads the VIP permission group (permanent OR active timed) from the plugin DB for every linked player and mirrors it onto the configured Discord role.  Players outside the link mapping are reported but never touched.
vipSync.strangerVips: Discord members with VIP role but no EOS link ({{n}})

errors.required: Select a Discord role AND type the ARK group name.

roleMap.title: Role sync (Discord -> ARK)
roleMap.explain: Each rule says: whoever has Discord role X receives permission group Y in the plugin DB (Players.PermissionGroups).  The sync engine does NOT touch groups not managed by active rules: the VIP sync (env DISCORD_VIP_ROLE_ID) and admin/custom groups pass through untouched.
roleMap.empty: No rules configured.  Add one below.

members.empty: No members visible.  Make sure the bot has the GUILD_MEMBERS privileged intent enabled in the Discord Developer Portal.

modal.dmPh: Plain text only.  Markdown is supported.
modal.reasonPh: e.g. spam, raid, violation of server rules

accounts.empty: No Discord accounts yet — ask an operator to Sign in with Discord at least once.

modal.search: Search by name, EOS or tribe

market.bought: Purchased! New balance: {{b}}. Use /market claim in-game to collect it.
market.confirmCancel: Cancel the listing?  The item will return to you via /market claim in-game.
market.cancelled: Cancelled. Use /market claim in-game to get it back.
market.title: Player market
market.subtitle: Buy, sell and manage your ARK items.
market.noMine: You have no items on the market.  Use /market upload in-game to add one.
